name: Cosmo: refine.ts cannot promote a childless Work Package
description: refine.ts wp.children/wp.brief gates fire unconditionally, so a childless WP cannot be promoted to Ready; sliced items can strand at Backlog with the wrong Altitude.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: refine.ts applies Work Package child-count and brief gates whenever Altitude=WP, so an item accidentally captured or sliced as a childless WP cannot reach Ready and has no sanctioned demote-to-Item path. Variants: (1) true WP with fewer than two children must still fail WP DoR; (2) childless/accidental WP should either be demoted to Item through an approved path or receive a precise recovery instruction; (3) normal Item refinement must remain unaffected. Regression test: add or update refine DoR/refine tests for childless WP recovery and true WP child-count enforcement.
